subcodes.first_line: O Beloved of My heart! Thy sublime missive brought transcendent joy. God willing, its fragrance shall perfume the realm of love [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا محبوب فوادی دستخط عالی فرح متعالی حاصل نمود انشاء الله عرفش عالم محبت و
subcodes.subjects: @forgiveness; grace; bounty; mercy; compassion of God, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @acknowledgment of gift; of monetary contribution, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness
